title: Baseline on the M4 Air safe defaults
rationale: Establish the first run that fully completes on this Apple Silicon machine after reducing the memory-heavy batch settings that broke final evaluation.
notes: Initial completed local baseline on Apple Silicon safe defaults.

title: Lower matrix learning rate
rationale: Test whether slightly calmer matrix-parameter updates improve learning quality in the fixed 5-minute budget without relying on Apple-specific throughput effects.
notes: Strong optimizer-side improvement with unchanged memory use.

title: Lower weight decay to 0.15
rationale: Test whether the current regularization is slightly too strong for this short training regime, while keeping the newly improved matrix learning rate in place.
notes: Large improvement and more optimizer steps at same memory footprint.

title: Raise Adam beta1 to 0.85
rationale: Test whether slightly stronger first-moment smoothing makes the now-faster short-run optimizer more stable, while preserving the two winning changes to matrix learning rate and weight decay.
notes: Small but clean optimizer win with unchanged memory and more completed steps in budget.

title: Raise Adam beta1 to 0.90
rationale: Test whether the small win from beta1 = 0.85 extends a little further, by giving the optimizer slightly more first-moment smoothing while keeping the other three winning settings unchanged.
notes: Clear loss. Raising beta1 to 0.90 made the short-run optimizer too sluggish relative to the current best recipe.
